DROP TABLE [RDM].[REF_SOCIAL_MEDIA_UNIT]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [RDM].[REF_SOCIAL_MEDIA_UNIT]
( 
	[OpCo] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[BranchID] [nvarchar](15)  NULL,
	[SocialMediaUnit] [varchar](50)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
